name: Jonas Bayer
summary: Phase-based depth recurrence (8 unique blocks, 40 effective layers at d=512) with MLA attention, graduated FP4/Int6 precision, FP8 stochastic rounding training, DeepNorm init, Muon+AdamW, QK-Clip, Z-Loss

variants.looped40: 8 unique × 4 phases × 5 reps = 40 depth, d=512, MLP3x, MLA(r=64), 24M params, ~13MB
variants.deep20: 20 unique layers, d=384, MLP3x, MLA(r=48), 34M params, ~15.5MB

innovations: Phase-based depth recurrence (not uniform ALBERT-style cycling)
Graduated precision: FP4 early layers, Int6 late layers
MLA (Multi-Head Latent Attention) with low-rank KV compression
Pure FP8 training with stochastic rounding (nothing above FP8 persists)
QK-Clip post-step attention score rescaling (Kimi K2)
